arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF05-001 ACTIVE — DATASET CLOSE. No RF-05 signals in B-031. Final batch is 5 days (Apr 8-12, 2026); 60 messages. COMP-RF04-030 (Apr 12 DARVO bruise/abuse-reversal: RF-04+RF-09+RF-11) contains no legal threat or custody threat component. RF-05 arc closes with ARC-RF05-001 unresolved: the Sep 17 'agreement ready to sign' (S-022) and the Nov 25 'big contempt case' (S-025) were both declared with specificity and attorney engagement but have no documented execution in the text record. Paper tiger trajectory confirmed as the arc's defining characteristic — sustained legal threat activity without documented filing execution across the full 2022-2026 dataset. ARC-RF05-001 formal resolution requires confirmation of whether any custody or contempt filing was actually executed post-Sep 2025.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: B-031 (Apr 8-12, 2026): Dataset close. Zero RF-05 primary flags. The final batch's primary RF-04 event (COMP-RF04-030: DARVO bruise/abuse-reversal) is significant for RF-04/RF-09/RF-15 but contains no legal threat component. Visit-refusal pattern persists but resolves within hours (ROW-15553). The RF-05 arc closes in a low-signal mode — the major escalation events (B-027 through B-029) are in the rear-view, and the final documented RF-05 primary signal is S-026 from B-030 (Mar 21, 2026).
